title: admin can create new Leistungskarten + show eyebrow-label
description:
## Summary
Closes ticket [BR-20260507-47be](https://web.mentolder.de/admin/bugs?ticket=BR-20260507-47be) — Gekko reported he couldn't create a new Leistungskarte at `/admin/inhalte?tab=website&section=startseite`.

- Add a `+ Leistungskarte` button (and per-card `Entfernen`) to the Angebote editor; admin-created cards expose slug, icon, and eyebrow-label inputs. Static config-backed cards keep their existing reorder/hide controls only.
- Fix `getEffectiveServices()`: instead of silently dropping override-only entries (no matching static slug), build the full `HomepageService` from override fields with sane fallbacks.
- Extend `ServiceOverride` with an optional `meta` field; `index.astro` falls back to it for the homepage eyebrow when the hardcoded slug→meta map has no entry.
- Add a hint in the Startseite section pointing to `?section=angebote` since that's where Gekko expected to find the editor.

After this lands, Block 05 ("Führung & Persönlichkeit") will be seeded into mentolder's `service_config` JSONB directly via psql.

## Test plan
- [x] `npx astro check` — no new errors from the changed files
- [ ] Verify on web.mentolder.de: open `/admin/inhalte?tab=website&section=angebote`, click `+ Leistungskarte`, fill title/eyebrow/etc., save, reload — card appears
- [ ] After save, the new card renders on the homepage with the eyebrow-label and links to its detail page
- [ ] Static cards (50plus-digital, coaching, beratung, ki-transition) keep their existing behaviour
- [ ] Block 05 content shows correctly after seeding

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
